CREATE TABLE test_timezone (id INT, event_time DATETIME);
SELECT event_time, CURRENT_TIMEZONE FROM test_timezone WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_timezone WHERE CURRENT_TIMEZONE = 'Europe/Amsterdam';
CREATE TABLE timezone_view AS SELECT id, event_time, CURRENT_TIMEZONE AS current_tz FROM test_timezone;
SELECT t.id, t.event_time FROM test_timezone t JOIN sys.var_values v ON v.variable = 'CURRENT_TIMEZONE' WHERE v.value = t.event_time;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_timezone WHERE event_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS future_events, CURRENT_TIMEZONE;
